One instruction inside Genspark Claw. 5 complete slide decks. Zero design tools opened.

Genspark, an all-in-one AI workspace, just launched AI Workspace 3.0 and scaled to $200M ARR in 11 months.

Here's how its new features save you hours:

@genspark_ai https://t.co/P1VuAS36DH

Genspark Claw is a personal AI agent with its own workspace.

One instruction typed inside Claw: "Build me 5 slide decks for a watch brand."

It researched the brand positioning, structured each deck differently, handled the design, and delivered all 5 as finished outputs. https://t.co/e1NJBDTQEo

One workflow setup.

Genspark scanned AI news sources, pulled what was relevant, summarized key developments, and delivered a complete structured AI Trends report.

Total time spent: the 3 minutes it took to build the workflow.

After that, it runs itself. https://t.co/CcHncZv7Gr

Genspark Meeting Bot joins your live meeting and delivers clean notes when it's over.

Every key decision captured. Action items broken out clearly. No rewatch. No manual notes.

It attends so you don't have to. https://t.co/qPP0ktPmIm

One search.
One sidebar.
20 organized AI trends.
Zero new tabs. Zero copy-pasting.

Genspark Chrome Extension works inside your browser while you browse. https://t.co/an5B8ktNAU

All of this is inside one workspace.

New users sign up to try some features for free and earn credits.

The wildest part: Genspark is offering unlimited usage of AI Chat and AI Image for all of 2026. Nano Banana 2, GPT Image, Flux, Seedream, Gemini 3.1 Pro, GPT-5.4, Claude Opus
